scenarios.description: preAuthorize accepts when delegation has commerce scope and amount within budget
preAuthorize rejects with 'no_commerce_scope' when required_scope absent from delegation
preAuthorize rejects with 'spend_limit_exceeded' when amount exceeds budget
preAuthorize rejects with 'wallet_revoked' when the bound wallet has been revoked
preAuthorize rejects with 'time_window_violation' after delegation.not_after has expired
emitReceipt produces a PaymentReceipt with a valid Ed25519 signature
emitReceipt output round-trips through JSON canonicalization and verifies clean
emitDenial produces a PaymentDenial with a valid Ed25519 signature
revokeWallet() halts subsequent preAuthorize calls bound to that wallet
emitted receipt.delegation_ref equals the input delegation receipt_id

note: Canonical inputs + expected outputs for the payment-rails conformance harness. Third-party adapters pin to schema_version and re-run the harness to claim conformance. Bump schema_version on any breaking shape change.
